enum_values.name: MainMode
enum_values.description: Voltage regulator in Main mode in Low-power run mode

enum_values.name: LowPowerMode
enum_values.description: Voltage regulator in low-power mode in Low-power run mode

enum_values.name: V1_2
enum_values.description: 1.2 V (range 1)

enum_values.name: V1_0
enum_values.description: 1.0 V (range 2)

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Access to RTC and backup registers disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Access to RTC and backup registers enabled

fields.name: FPDS
fields.description: Flash memory power down mode during LPSleep for CPU1

enum_values.name: Idle
enum_values.description: Flash memory in Idle mode when system is in LPSleep mode

enum_values.name: PowerDown
enum_values.description: Flash memory in Power-down mode when system is in LPSleep mode

fields.name: FPDR
fields.description: Flash memory power down mode during LPRun for CPU1

enum_values.name: Idle
enum_values.description: Flash memory in Idle mode when system is in LPRun mode

enum_values.name: PowerDown
enum_values.description: Flash memory in Power-down mode when system is in LPRun mode

enum_values.name: SUBGHZSPICR
enum_values.description: sub-GHz SPI NSS signal driven from PWR_SUBGHZSPICR.NSS (RFBUSYMS functionality enabled)

enum_values.name: LPTIM3
enum_values.description: sub-GHz SPI NSS signal driven from LPTIM3_OUT (RFBUSYMS functionality disabled)

enum_values.name: Stop0
enum_values.description: Stop 0 mode

enum_values.name: Stop1
enum_values.description: Stop 1 mode

enum_values.name: Stop2
enum_values.description: Stop 2 mode

enum_values.name: Standby
enum_values.description: Standby mode

enum_values.name: Shutdown
enum_values.description: Shutdown mode

fields.name: PVME3
fields.description: Peripheral voltage monitoring 3 enable: VDDA vs. 1.62V

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: PVM3 (VDDA monitoring versus 1.62 V threshold) disable

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: PVM3 (VDDA monitoring versus 1.62 V threshold) enable

enum_values.name: External
enum_values.description: External input analog voltage PVD_IN (compared internally to VREFINT)

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: PVD Disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: PVD Enabled

fields.name: EIWUL
fields.description: Enable internal wakeup line for CPU1

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Internal wakeup line interrupt to CPU1 disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Internal wakeup line interrupt to CPU1 enabled

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Radio IRQ[2:0] is disabled and does not trigger a wakeup from Standby event to CPU1.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Radio IRQ[2:0] is enabled and triggers a wakeup from Standby event to CPU1.

fields.name: EWRFBUSY
fields.description: Enable Radio BUSY Wakeup from Standby for CPU1

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Radio Busy is disabled and does not trigger a wakeup from Standby event to CPU1 when a rising or a falling edge occurs

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Radio Busy is enabled and triggers a wakeup from Standby event to CPU1 when a rising or a falling edge occurs. The active edge is configured via the WRFBUSYP bit in PWR_CR4

fields.name: APC
fields.description: Apply pull-up and pull-down configuration from CPU1

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: I/O pull-up and pull-down configurations defined in the PWR_PUCRx and PWR_PDCRx registers are applied

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: PWR_PUCRx and PWR_PDCRx registers are NOT applied to the I/Os

enum_values.name: PowerOff
enum_values.description: SRAM2 powered off in Standby mode (SRAM2 content lost)

enum_values.name: OnLPR
enum_values.description: SRAM2 powered by the low-power regulator in Standby mode (SRAM2 content kept)

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: PVD not enabled by the sub-GHz radio active state

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: PVD enabled while the sub-GHz radio is active

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Disable (the supply voltage is monitored continuously)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable, when set, the supply voltage is sampled for PDR/BOR reset condition only periodically

fields.name: EWUP3
fields.description: Enable Wakeup pin WKUP3 for CPU1

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: WKUP pin 3 is used for general purpose I/Os. An event on the WKUP pin 3 does not wakeup the device from Standby mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: WKUP pin 3 is used for wakeup from Standby mode and forced in input pull down configuration (rising edge on WKUP pin 3wakes-up the system from Standby mode)

fields.name: EWUP2
fields.description: Enable Wakeup pin WKUP2 for CPU1

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: WKUP pin 2 is used for general purpose I/Os. An event on the WKUP pin 2 does not wakeup the device from Standby mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: WKUP pin 2 is used for wakeup from Standby mode and forced in input pull down configuration (rising edge on WKUP pin 2 wakes-up the system from Standby mode)

fields.name: EWUP1
fields.description: Enable Wakeup pin WKUP1 for CPU1

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: WKUP pin 1 is used for general purpose I/Os. An event on the WKUP pin 1 does not wakeup the device from Standby mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: WKUP pin 1 is used for wakeup from Standby mode and forced in input pull down configuration (rising edge on WKUP pin 1 wakes-up the system from Standby mode)

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on high level (rising edge)

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on low level (falling edge)

enum_values.name: R5k
enum_values.description: VBAT charging through a 5 kΩ resistor

enum_values.name: R1_5k
enum_values.description: VBAT charging through a 1.5 kΩ resistor

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: VBAT battery charging disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: VBAT battery charging enabled

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on high level (rising edge)

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on low level (falling edge)

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on high level (rising edge)

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on low level (falling edge)

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on high level (rising edge)

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Detection on low level (falling edge)

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: All internal wakeup sources are cleared

enum_values.name: Wakeup
enum_values.description: wakeup is detected on the internal wakeup line

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: No wakeup event detected on radio busy

enum_values.name: Wakeup
enum_values.description: Wakeup event detected on radio busy

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: No wakeup event detected on PVD

enum_values.name: Wakeup
enum_values.description: Wakeup event detected on PVD

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: No wakeup event detected on WKUP3

enum_values.name: Wakeup
enum_values.description: Wakeup event detected on WKUP3

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: No wakeup event detected on WKUP2

enum_values.name: Wakeup
enum_values.description: Wakeup event detected on WKUP2

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: No wakeup event detected on WKUP1

enum_values.name: Wakeup
enum_values.description: Wakeup event detected on WKUP1

fields.name: PVMO3
fields.description: Peripheral voltage monitoring output: VDDA vs. 1.62 V

enum_values.name: Above
enum_values.description: VDDA voltage above PVM3 threshold (around 1.62 V)

enum_values.name: Below
enum_values.description: VDDA voltage below PVM3 threshold (around 1.62 V)

enum_values.name: Above
enum_values.description: VDD or voltage level on PVD_IN above the selected PVD threshold

enum_values.name: Below
enum_values.description: VDD or voltage level on PVD_IN below the selected PVD threshold

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: Regulator ready in the selected voltage range

enum_values.name: Change
enum_values.description: Regulator output voltage changed to the required voltage level

enum_values.name: Main
enum_values.description: Main regulator (MR) ready and used

enum_values.name: LowPower
enum_values.description: Low-power regulator (LPR) used

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: LPR not ready

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: LPR ready

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: Flash memory not ready to be accessed

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: Flash memory ready to be accessed

enum_values.name: V_DD
enum_values.description: Main regulator supplied directly from VDD

enum_values.name: LDO_SMPS
enum_values.description: Main regulator supplied through LDO or SMPS

enum_values.name: Above
enum_values.description: Supply voltage above radio end-of-life operating low level

enum_values.name: Below
enum_values.description: Supply voltage below radio end-of-life operating low level

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: LDO not ready or off

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: LDO ready

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: SMPS step-down converter not ready or off

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: SMPS step-down converter ready

enum_values.name: NotBusy
enum_values.description: radio busy masked signal low (not busy)

enum_values.name: Busy
enum_values.description: radio busy masked signal high (busy)

enum_values.name: NotBusy
enum_values.description: radio busy signal low (not busy)

enum_values.name: Busy
enum_values.description: radio busy signal high (busy)

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Setting this bit clears the WRFBUSYF flag in the PWR_SR1. This bit is always read 0.

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Setting this bit clears the WPVDF flag in the PWR_SR1. This bit is always read as 0.

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Setting this bit clears the WUF3 flag in the PWR_SR1 register. This bit is always read as 0.

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Setting this bit clears the WUF2 flag in the PWR_SR1 register. This bit is always read as 0.

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Setting this bit clears the WUF1 flag in the PWR_SR1 register. This bit is always read as 0.

fields.name: SMPSEN
fields.description: Enable SMPS Step Down converter SMPS mode enabled.

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: SMPS step-down converter SMPS mode disabled (LDO mode enabled)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: SMPS step-down converter SMPS mode enabled

fields.name: RFEOLEN
fields.description: Enable Radio End Of Life detector enabled

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Radio end-of-life detector disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Radio end-of-life detector enabled

registers.name: PUCRA
registers.description: Power Port A pull-up control register

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Disable pull-up on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable pull-up on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3). The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PA[y] bit is also set

fields.name: PU13
fields.description: Port PA[y] pull-up bit y (y=0 to 13)

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Disable pull-up on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable pull-up on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3). The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PA[y] bit is also set

registers.name: PDCRA
registers.description: Power Port A pull-down control register

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Disable the pull-down on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable the pull-down on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Disable the pull-down on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable the pull-down on PA[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Disable pull-up on PB[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable pull-up on PB[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3). The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PB[y] bit is also set

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Disable pull-up on PB[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable pull-up on PB[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3). The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PB[y] bit is also set

enum_values.description: Enable the pull-down on PB[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable the pull-down on PB[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.description: Enable pull-up on PC[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3). The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PC[y] bit is also set

enum_values.description: Disable pull-up on PC[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable pull-up on PC[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3). The pull-up is not activated if the corresponding PC[y] bit is also set

enum_values.description: Enable the pull-down on PC[y] when both APC bits are set in PWR control register 3 (PWR_CR3)

registers.name: EXTSCR
registers.description: Power extended status and status clear register

enum_values.name: RunningOrSleep
enum_values.description: CPU is running or in sleep

enum_values.name: DeepSleep
enum_values.description: CPU is in Deep-Sleep

fields.name: C1STOPF
fields.description: System Stop0, 1 flag for CPU1. (All core states retained)

enum_values.name: NoStop
enum_values.description: System has not been in Stop 0 or 1 mode

enum_values.name: Stop
enum_values.description: System has been in Stop 0 or 1 mode

fields.name: C1STOP2F
fields.description: System Stop2 flag for CPU1. (partial core states retained)

enum_values.name: NoStop
enum_values.description: System has not been in Stop 2 mode

enum_values.name: Stop
enum_values.description: System has been in Stop 2 mode

fields.name: C1SBF
fields.description: System Standby flag for CPU1. (no core states retained)

enum_values.name: NoStandby
enum_values.description: System has not been in Standby mode

enum_values.name: Standby
enum_values.description: System has been in Standby mode

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Setting this bit clears the C1STOPF and C1SBF bits

enum_values.name: Low
enum_values.description: Sub-GHz SPI NSS signal at level low

enum_values.name: High
enum_values.description: Sub-GHz SPI NSS signal is at level high
